overview.title:
Spaces from
the workshop.
overview.lede: A selection of the projects we completed between 2024 and 2026 — homes, hospitality and mixed-use spaces in Germany and Switzerland.

map.title:
Built in two
countries, the same
standard.
map.intro: Across Germany and Switzerland, we look after projects with the same site managers, suppliers and standards.

detail.ctaText: Tell us about it — first consultation free, an appointment within 48 hours.
detail.videoNoticeOne: The video is embedded via YouTube and only loads once you give your consent.
detail.videoNoticeMany: The videos are embedded via YouTube and only load once you give your consent.

bad-soden-einfamilienhaus.title: Bad Soden Detached House · 2026
bad-soden-einfamilienhaus.headline: Bad Soden Detached House
description: Full renovation of a detached house in Bad Soden am Taunus — from stripped-back existing fabric to a move-in-ready interior.
The fit-out included the attic level, drywall, underfloor heating with screed, high-quality floor finishes, wallpapering, painting and coordination of the interior trades.
The photo sequence shows the path from shell and facade work through technical installation to the finished living, bathroom and bedroom spaces.

zoi-restaurant.title: Zoi — Restaurant · Frankfurt · 2026
zoi-restaurant.headline: Zoi Restaurant
zoi-restaurant.videoLabel: Renovating a restaurant in record time — the film
description: A Greek-Mediterranean restaurant — Zoi (Greek for “life”) — from bare commercial space to turnkey opening, all from a single source.

The interior is built around sculptural arches and rounded niches: deep terracotta walls with recessed alcoves, dark wood panelling and a bespoke bar with a mosaic counter form the design backbone of the dining room.

Hand-painted botanical murals and a coordinated lighting scheme add warm accents, while every trade — including hospitality ventilation and the complete kitchen installation — interlocks in a coordinated way.

riad-restaurant.title: Riad — Restaurant · Frankfurt · 2025
riad-restaurant.headline: Riad Restaurant
description: A Moroccan-inspired restaurant in the heart of Sachsenhausen — from bare commercial space to turnkey opening in 14 weeks.

The concept combines traditional riad architecture with modern Frankfurt ambition: handmade zellige tiles, an open show kitchen, copper accents and a lighting system that guides the guest through the evening.
All 20 trades were coordinated from a single source — including a ventilation system compliant with hospitality regulations and the complete kitchen installation.

villa-sichtbeton.title: Exposed-Concrete Villa · Lucerne · 2024
villa-sichtbeton.headline: Exposed-Concrete Villa
description: Full renovation of a 1970s villa with exposed concrete and sculptural spatial design.
The existing fabric was preserved and complemented with modern additions: exposed-concrete stairs, an open living-dining area with floor-to-ceiling windows and a bathroom concept in natural stone.
Particular focus on the thermal renovation of the building envelope while preserving its brutalist character.

kueche-eichenholz.title: Oak Kitchen · Frankfurt · 2025
kueche-eichenholz.headline: Oak Kitchen
description: A bespoke fitted kitchen in solid oak with a handleless front and an integrated cooking island.
The entire cooking and dining area was reorganised: new electrical and water connections, underfloor heating, an LED light strip and a seamless transition to the living area.

spa-bad-hotel.title: Spa Bath — Hotel · Emmenbrücke · 2025
spa-bad-hotel.headline: Spa Bath Hotel
description: Conversion of a classic hotel bathroom into a modern spa landscape with a freestanding tub, rain shower and natural stone.
The lighting scheme relies on indirect LED strips and a starry sky above the tub — dimmed via KNX.

office-lobby.title: Office Lobby · Frankfurt · 2026
office-lobby.headline: Office Lobby
description: Redesign of an office building's lobby with a living tree as a room divider, a natural-stone reception counter and acoustically effective ceiling panels.
The floor design combines large-format porcelain stoneware with inlaid metal strips — a visual guidance system that leads visitors intuitively to reception.

sushi-counter.title: Sushi Counter · Wiesbaden · 2025
sushi-counter.headline: Sushi Counter
description: A 16-seat counter in oiled oak with integrated refrigeration and a live-preparation zone.

The compact space was planned down to the detail: ventilation system, water treatment, sushi display case and minimalist wood cladding that combines Japanese simplicity with Wiesbaden's Gründerzeit heritage.

treppenhaus-sichtbeton.title: Exposed-Concrete Staircase · Lucerne · 2024
treppenhaus-sichtbeton.headline: Exposed-Concrete Staircase
description: A cantilevered exposed-concrete spiral staircase over three storeys with an inset LED handrail and a stainless-steel balustrade.
The existing wooden staircase was removed and replaced with a monolithic concrete structure — cast on site, ground and sealed.

doppelbad.title: Double Bathroom · Frankfurt · 2025
doppelbad.headline: Double Bathroom
description: Two connected bathrooms — a master bath with a freestanding tub and a guest WC with a shower — in a continuous material concept of grey natural stone.
Floor-flush showers, wall-hung WCs and a bespoke double washbasin in Corian.

naturstein-bad.title: Natural-Stone Bath · Sachsenhausen · 2024
naturstein-bad.headline: Natural-Stone Bath
description: Full renovation of a period-building bathroom with continuous limestone on walls and floor.
Laid joint on joint, with minimal expansion joints — the result looks as if cut from a single block.

riad-bar-ecke.title: Riad — Bar Corner · Frankfurt · 2025
riad-bar-ecke.headline: Riad Bar Corner
description: The intimate bar corner of the Riad restaurant — with a bespoke counter in dark walnut, Moroccan tiles and warm copper light.
The area is acoustically separated from the main room and seats 18 guests.

concrete-corner.title: Concrete Corner · Lucerne · 2024
concrete-corner.headline: Concrete Corner
description: The open living area of the Exposed-Concrete Villa — with floor-to-ceiling windows, an inset fireplace and a seamless transition to the terrace.
The exposed-concrete walls were ground and protected with a transparent sealer.

wine-bar.title: Wine Bar · Frankfurt · 2026
wine-bar.headline: Wine Bar
description: An elegant wine bar with a temperature-controlled wine store behind glass, a rustic oak counter and atmospheric pendant lighting.
The air-conditioning was sized specifically for wine storage — separate zones for red and white wine.

spa-korridor.title: Spa Corridor · Emmenbrücke · 2025
spa-korridor.headline: Spa Corridor
description: The transition between the hotel rooms and the spa area — designed as a meditative corridor with indirect light, oak slats and a water feature at the end of the passage.

eiche-parkett.title: Oak Parquet · Wiesbaden · 2025
eiche-parkett.headline: Oak Parquet
description: Laying solid oak boards in a herringbone pattern in a period apartment — including subfloor preparation, impact-sound insulation and skirting boards.
The boards were ground on site and triple-oiled for a natural, warm feel.

lobby-garden.title: Lobby Garden · Frankfurt · 2026
lobby-garden.headline: Lobby Garden
description: The planted area of the Office Lobby — a living olive tree surrounded by seating islands in brushed concrete and integrated planting beds.
Irrigation and drainage were hidden beneath the flooring, the lighting controlled by an automated daylight cycle.

riad-lampen.title: Riad — Lamps · Frankfurt · 2025
riad-lampen.headline: Riad Lamps
description: Hand-crafted Moroccan brass lamps, imported individually and connected on site to a dimmable LED system.
Each lamp casts its own pattern of shadows on the wall — a play of light and ornament that runs through the entire dining room.
